mapper.select: select room_id as roomId, member_id as memberId, title, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from ai_chat_room where member_id = #{memberId} order by created_at desc limit 1

select message_id as messageId, room_id as roomId, sender_type as senderType, message, created_at as createdAt from ( select message_id, room_id, sender_type, message, created_at from ai_chat_message where room_id = #{roomId} order by message_id desc limit 20 ) recent_message order by message_id asc

select message_id as messageId, room_id as roomId, sender_type as senderType, message, created_at as createdAt from ( select message_id, room_id, sender_type, message, created_at from ai_chat_message where room_id = #{roomId} order by message_id desc limit 10 ) recent_message order by message_id asc
